response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, extensive open-source contributions, and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP protocols, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade GenAI systems, cloud-native RAG architectures, or vector databases — key requirements for this staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Demonstrated experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Strong full-stack proficiency in TypeScript/Node.js and cloud-native tooling (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Proven leadership in open-source projects and technical mentoring through workshops and community contributions
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM optimization techniques in resume
Work history lacks clear enterprise customer-facing GenAI deployment experience; roles appear startup/NGO-focused
8+ years of AI experience not clearly substantiated — most roles are general software development without GenAI focus
